passage_title: Archaeologists discover evidence of prehistoric island settlers

sentences.sentence: In early April 2019, Dr Ceri Shipton and his colleagues from Australian National University became the first archaeologists to explore Obi, one of many tropical islands in Indonesia's Maluku Utara province.
sentences.translation: 2019年4月初，来自澳大利亚国立大学的 Ceri Shipton 博士及其同事成为首批探索奥比岛的考古学家；奥比岛是印度尼西亚北马鲁古省众多热带岛屿之一。

structure.text: Dr Ceri Shipton and his colleagues from Australian National University
one of many tropical islands in Indonesia's Maluku Utara province

difficult_points: 句子主干是 Shipton and his colleagues became the first archaeologists。
to explore Obi 是不定式短语，说明“第一批考古学家”具体做了什么。
逗号后的 one of many tropical islands 是 Obi 的同位语，补充说明其地理身份。

expressions.meaning_zh: 成为第一批做某事的考古学家

sentences.sentence: The research team's discoveries suggest that the prehistoric people who lived on Obi were adept on both land and sea, hunting in the dense rainforest, foraging on the seashore, and possibly even voyaging between islands.
sentences.translation: 研究团队的发现表明，曾生活在奥比岛的史前人类无论在陆地还是海上都很熟练：他们在茂密雨林中狩猎，在海岸觅食，甚至可能在岛屿之间航行。

structure.text: that the prehistoric people who lived on Obi were adept on both land and sea
hunting in the dense rainforest, foraging on the seashore, and possibly even voyaging between islands

difficult_points: suggest 后的 that 从句承载研究发现的具体内容。
who lived on Obi 是定语从句，限定 prehistoric people。
hunting、foraging 和 voyaging 三个现在分词并列，具体说明他们在陆地和海上的能力。

expressions.text: be adept on both land and sea
expressions.meaning_zh: 在陆地和海上都很熟练

sentences.sentence: The excavations were part of a project to learn more about how people first dispersed from mainland Asia, through the Indonesian archipelago and into the prehistoric continent that once connected Australia and New Guinea.
sentences.translation: 这些发掘是一项项目的一部分，该项目旨在进一步了解人类最初如何从亚洲大陆出发，穿过印度尼西亚群岛，进入曾经连接澳大利亚和新几内亚的史前大陆。

structure.text: to learn more about how people first dispersed from mainland Asia, through the Indonesian archipelago and into the prehistoric continent
how people first dispersed from mainland Asia, through the Indonesian archipelago and into the prehistoric continent
that once connected Australia and New Guinea

difficult_points: 主干是 The excavations were part of a project。
to learn more about... 说明这个项目的目的。
how 引导的名词性从句作 about 的宾语，that 从句修饰 prehistoric continent。

sentences.sentence: The team's earlier research suggested that the northernmost islands in the group, known as the Wallacean islands, including Obi, would have offered the easiest migration route.
sentences.translation: 该团队早先的研究表明，这一群岛中最北端的岛屿，即被称为华莱士群岛、其中包括奥比岛的那些岛屿，可能曾提供最容易的迁徙路线。

structure.text: that the northernmost islands in the group, known as the Wallacean islands, including Obi, would have offered the easiest migration route

difficult_points: suggested 后的 that 从句说明早期研究提出的观点。
known as... 和 including Obi 都插入补充说明 northernmost islands。
would have offered 表示对过去可能情况的推断，而不是将来动作。

expressions.meaning_zh: 本可能提供；可能曾提供

sentences.sentence: It also seemed likely that these islands were crucial 'stepping stones' on humans' island-hopping voyages through this region millennia ago.
sentences.translation: 这些岛屿似乎也很可能是数千年前人类在该地区进行跳岛航行时至关重要的“踏脚石”。

structure.text: that these islands were crucial 'stepping stones' on humans' island-hopping voyages through this region millennia ago

difficult_points: It 是形式主语，真正内容由 that 从句表达。
'stepping stones' 是比喻，指帮助人类逐步跨越海域的中转岛屿。
island-hopping 修饰 voyages，表示从一个岛到另一个岛的航行方式。

sentences.sentence: But to support this idea, they needed archaeological evidence for humans living in this remote area in the ancient past.
sentences.translation: 但要支持这一观点，他们需要有关古代人类曾生活在这一偏远地区的考古证据。

structure.text: archaeological evidence for humans living in this remote area in the ancient past
living in this remote area in the ancient past

difficult_points: 句首不定式 to support this idea 表示目的。
for humans living... 说明 evidence 所要证明的内容。
living in this remote area 是现在分词短语，后置修饰 humans。

sentences.sentence: So, they travelled to Obi to look for sites that might reveal evidence of early occupation.
sentences.translation: 因此，他们前往奥比岛寻找可能揭示早期居住证据的地点。

structure.text: that might reveal evidence of early occupation

difficult_points: So 承接上一句，表示他们前往 Obi 的原因。
to look for sites 是目的状语，说明 travel 的目的。
that 引导定语从句修饰 sites，might 表示这些地点只是可能提供证据。

sentences.sentence: Just inland from the village of Kelo on Obi's northern coast, Shipton and his colleagues found two caves containing prehistoric rock shelters that were suitable for excavation.
sentences.translation: 在奥比岛北部海岸的凯洛村稍往内陆处，Shipton 和同事们发现了两个洞穴，里面有适合发掘的史前岩棚。

structure.text: Just inland from the village of Kelo on Obi's northern coast
two caves containing prehistoric rock shelters

difficult_points: 句首地点短语较长，核心位置是 inland from the village of Kelo。
containing... 是现在分词短语，修饰 two caves。
that 从句修饰 prehistoric rock shelters，说明这些岩棚适合挖掘。

sentences.sentence: With the permission and help of the local people of Kelo, they dug a small test excavation in each shelter.
sentences.translation: 在凯洛当地人的许可和帮助下，他们在每处岩棚里进行了小规模试掘。

structure.text: With the permission and help of the local people of Kelo

difficult_points: With 短语交代发掘得以进行的条件和支持。
dug a small test excavation 指进行试探性挖掘，不是普通“挖一个东西”。
each shelter 指上一句中的两个史前岩棚。

expressions.text: with the permission and help of

sentences.sentence: There they found numerous artefacts, including fragments of axes, some dating to about 14,000 years ago.
sentences.translation: 他们在那里发现了大量人工制品，包括斧头碎片，其中一些可追溯到约一万四千年前。

structure.text: some dating to about 14,000 years ago

difficult_points: There 指前一句提到的岩棚，不是存在句的 there。
including fragments of axes 补充说明 artefacts 的类型。
some dating... 是独立结构，说明部分斧头碎片的年代。

sentences.sentence: The earliest axes at Kelo were made using clam shells.
sentences.translation: 凯洛发现的最早斧头是用蛤壳制成的。
difficult_points: were made 是被动结构，强调斧头的制作材料。
using clam shells 是方式状语，说明制作所用材料。
earliest 限定的是 Kelo 遗址中发现的斧头。

sentences.sentence: Axes made from clam shells from roughly the same time had also previously been found elsewhere in this region, including on the nearby island of Gebe to the northeast.
sentences.translation: 大约同一时期的蛤壳斧此前也曾在该地区其他地方被发现，包括东北方向附近的格贝岛。

structure.text: Axes made from clam shells from roughly the same time
including on the nearby island of Gebe to the northeast

difficult_points: made from clam shells 是过去分词短语，后置修饰 Axes。
had previously been found 是过去完成时的被动，表示早于 Kelo 发现的发现记录。
including... 补充说明 elsewhere in this region 的具体地点。

sentences.sentence: As on Gebe, it is highly likely that Obi's axes were used in the construction of canoes, thus allowing these early peoples to maintain connections between communities on neighbouring islands.
sentences.translation: 与格贝岛的情况一样，奥比岛的斧头很可能被用于建造独木舟，从而使这些早期人群能够维持邻近岛屿社群之间的联系。

structure.text: that Obi's axes were used in the construction of canoes
were used in the construction of canoes
thus allowing these early peoples to maintain connections between communities on neighbouring islands

difficult_points: it is highly likely 是形式主语结构，that 从句是真正内容。
were used in the construction of canoes 是被动结构，说明斧头用途。
thus allowing... 是结果性分词短语，说明建造独木舟带来的后果。

expressions.text: be used in the construction of

sentences.sentence: The oldest cultural layers from the Kelo site provided the team with the earliest record for human occupation on Obi, dating back around 18,000 years.
sentences.translation: 凯洛遗址最古老的文化层为研究团队提供了奥比岛人类居住的最早记录，其年代可追溯到约一万八千年前。

structure.text: The oldest cultural layers from the Kelo site
provided the team with the earliest record for human occupation on Obi
the earliest record for human occupation on Obi

difficult_points: provided A with B 表示“为 A 提供 B”，the team 是间接受益者。
for human occupation on Obi 修饰 record，说明记录的内容。
dating back... 是现在分词短语，补充说明这条记录的年代。

sentences.sentence: At this time the climate was drier and colder than today, and the island's dense rainforests would likely have been much less impenetrable than they are now.
sentences.translation: 在这一时期，气候比今天更干燥、更寒冷，岛上茂密的雨林也很可能远没有现在这样难以穿越。

structure.text: the climate was drier and colder than today
the island's dense rainforests would likely have been much less impenetrable than they are now

difficult_points: At this time 指上一句约一万八千年前这一时期。
drier and colder than today 是比较结构，与现在气候对比。
would likely have been 表示对过去状态的推测。

sentences.sentence: Sea levels were about 120 metres lower, meaning Obi was a much larger island, encompassing what is today the separate island of Bisa, as well as several other small islands nearby.
sentences.translation: 当时海平面约低120米，这意味着奥比岛要大得多，包含了今天独立成岛的比萨岛以及附近其他几个小岛。

structure.text: meaning Obi was a much larger island
Obi was a much larger island
encompassing what is today the separate island of Bisa, as well as several other small islands nearby
what is today the separate island of Bisa

difficult_points: meaning... 是结果性分词短语，解释低海平面对岛屿面积的影响。
encompassing... 继续补充说明 larger island 的范围。
what is today... 表示“今天是……的地方”，引出现在与过去地貌的差异。

expressions.text: Sea levels were about 120 metres lower

sentences.sentence: Roughly 11,700 years ago, as the most recent ice age ended, the climate became significantly warmer and wetter, no doubt making Obi's jungle much thicker.
sentences.translation: 大约一万一千七百年前，随着最近一次冰期结束，气候明显变得更暖、更湿，这无疑使奥比岛的丛林更加茂密。

structure.text: as the most recent ice age ended
no doubt making Obi's jungle much thicker

difficult_points: as 引导时间状语从句，表示气候变化发生在冰期结束之际。
significantly warmer and wetter 是并列比较级，说明气候变化方向。
no doubt making... 是结果性分词短语，说明气候变化对丛林的影响。

expressions.meaning_zh: 大约一万一千七百年前

sentences.sentence: According to the researchers, it is no coincidence that around this time the first axes crafted from stone rather than sea shells appear, likely in response to their heavy-duty use for clearing and modification of the increasingly dense rainforest.
sentences.translation: 研究人员认为，大约在这一时期，第一批由石头而不是海贝壳制成的斧头出现并非巧合；这很可能是为了应对它们在清理和改造日益茂密的雨林时的高强度使用。

structure.text: that around this time the first axes crafted from stone rather than sea shells appear
crafted from stone rather than sea shells
likely in response to their heavy-duty use for clearing and modification of the increasingly dense rainforest

difficult_points: it is no coincidence 是形式主语结构，that 从句说明“并非巧合”的具体事件。
crafted from stone rather than sea shells 后置修饰 axes，突出材料变化。
in response to... 说明石斧出现可能是对高强度雨林清理需求的回应。

sentences.sentence: While stone takes about twice as long to grind into an axe compared to shell, the harder material keeps its sharp edge for longer.
sentences.translation: 虽然把石头磨成斧头所需时间约为贝壳的两倍，但这种更坚硬的材料能更久地保持锋利边缘。

structure.text: While stone takes about twice as long to grind into an axe compared to shell
stone takes about twice as long
keeps its sharp edge for longer

difficult_points: While 引导让步从句，表示石头加工更慢但有优势。
twice as long 是倍数比较结构，比较磨制时间。
the harder material 指 stone，不是 shell。

sentences.sentence: Judging by the bones which the researchers unearthed in the Kelo caves, people living there mainly hunted the Rothschild's cuscus, a possum-like creature that still lives on Obi today.
sentences.translation: 根据研究人员在凯洛洞穴中发掘出的骨骼判断，生活在那里的人主要猎捕罗氏袋貂，这是一种类似负鼠、至今仍生活在奥比岛上的动物。

structure.text: Judging by the bones which the researchers unearthed in the Kelo caves
which the researchers unearthed in the Kelo caves
a possum-like creature that still lives on Obi today
that still lives on Obi today

difficult_points: Judging by... 是分词短语，表示判断依据。
which 从句修饰 bones，说明这些骨骼来自研究人员的发掘。
逗号后的 a possum-like creature 是 Rothschild's cuscus 的同位语。

expressions.meaning_zh: 今天仍生活在奥比岛上

sentences.sentence: As the forest grew more dense, people probably used axes to clear patches of forest and make hunting easier.
sentences.translation: 随着森林变得更加茂密，人们可能使用斧头清理出一片片林地，使狩猎更容易。

structure.text: As the forest grew more dense
to clear patches of forest and make hunting easier

difficult_points: As 引导时间/伴随状语从句，表示森林变密与用斧清理的关系。
to clear... and make... 是并列目的结构，说明使用斧头的用途。
probably 表明这是基于证据的推测。

sentences.sentence: Shipton's team's excavation of the shelters at the Kelo site unearthed a volcanic glass substance called obsidian, which must have been brought over from another island, as there is no known source on Obi.
sentences.translation: Shipton 团队对凯洛遗址岩棚的发掘发现了一种名为黑曜石的火山玻璃物质；它一定是从另一座岛带来的，因为奥比岛上没有已知来源。

structure.text: Shipton's team's excavation of the shelters at the Kelo site
a volcanic glass substance called obsidian
which must have been brought over from another island
as there is no known source on Obi

difficult_points: 句子主语是 excavation，不是 Shipton's team。
called obsidian 后置修饰 substance，说明这种物质的名称。
which 引导非限制性定语从句，as 从句给出黑曜石应来自外岛的原因。

sentences.sentence: It also revealed particular types of beads, similar to those previously found on islands in southern Wallacea.
sentences.translation: 这次发掘还发现了几类特殊珠子，它们与此前在华莱士南部岛屿上发现的珠子相似。

structure.text: similar to those previously found on islands in southern Wallacea
previously found on islands in southern Wallacea

difficult_points: It 指上一句的 excavation，而不是 obsidian。
similar to... 是形容词短语，说明 beads 与其他岛屿发现物的相似性。
those 指代 beads，避免重复。

expressions.meaning_zh: 与此前发现的那些相似

sentences.sentence: These finds again support the idea that Obi islanders routinely travelled to other islands.
sentences.translation: 这些发现再次支持这样一种观点：奥比岛居民经常前往其他岛屿。

structure.text: that Obi islanders routinely travelled to other islands

difficult_points: These finds 指黑曜石和珠子两类发现。
that 从句解释 the idea 的具体内容。
routinely 表示跨岛旅行并非偶发，而是经常发生。

sentences.sentence: The excavations suggest people successfully lived in the two Kelo shelters for about 10,000 years.
sentences.translation: 发掘结果显示，人们在这两处凯洛岩棚中成功生活了约一万年。

structure.text: people successfully lived in the two Kelo shelters for about 10,000 years

difficult_points: suggest 后省略 that，后面的完整分句是研究推断的内容。
successfully lived 强调这些岩棚长期支持了人类居住。
for about 10,000 years 表示持续时间。

sentences.sentence: But then, about 8,000 years ago, both were abandoned.
sentences.translation: 但随后，大约八千年前，这两处岩棚都被废弃了。
difficult_points: But then 表示与前一句长期居住形成转折。
both 指两处 Kelo shelters。
were abandoned 是被动结构，说明遗址不再被使用。

sentences.sentence: Did the residents leave Obi completely, or move elsewhere on the island?
sentences.translation: 这些居民是彻底离开了奥比岛，还是搬到了岛上的其他地方？

structure.text: or move elsewhere on the island

difficult_points: 这是一般疑问句，Did 提前，两个动作 leave 和 move 形成选择关系。
the residents 指此前住在两处岩棚的人。
elsewhere on the island 表示仍在奥比岛内的其他地方。

sentences.sentence: Perhaps the jungle had grown so thick that axes were no longer a match for the dense undergrowth.
sentences.translation: 也许丛林已经长得如此茂密，以至于斧头再也无法对付浓密的林下植被。

structure.text: that axes were no longer a match for the dense undergrowth
were no longer a match for

difficult_points: Perhaps 标明这只是作者提出的一种可能解释。
had grown 使用过去完成时，表示丛林变密发生在废弃之前或之前一段时间。
so...that... 是结果结构，说明丛林茂密造成的后果。

expressions.meaning_zh: 已经长得如此茂密以至于……

sentences.sentence: Perhaps people simply moved to the coast and turned to fishing rather than hunting as a means of survival.
sentences.translation: 也许人们只是搬到海岸边，并转而以捕鱼而非狩猎作为生存手段。

structure.text: and turned to fishing rather than hunting

difficult_points: Perhaps 延续上一句的推测语气。
moved to the coast 和 turned to fishing 是并列动作。
rather than hunting 表示与狩猎相比，捕鱼成为新的选择。

sentences.sentence: Whatever the reason for the departure, there is no evidence for use of the Kelo shelters after this time, until about 1,000 years ago, when they were re-occupied by people who owned pottery as well as items made out of gold and silver.
sentences.translation: 无论离开的原因是什么，在此之后都没有证据表明凯洛岩棚被使用过，直到约一千年前，它们才被拥有陶器以及金银制品的人重新占据。

structure.text: Whatever the reason for the departure
there is no evidence for use of the Kelo shelters after this time
when they were re-occupied by people who owned pottery as well as items made out of gold and silver
who owned pottery as well as items made out of gold and silver
made out of gold and silver

difficult_points: Whatever 引导让步状语从句，表示无论离开原因如何。
there is no evidence for use... 是存在句，说明考古证据的空白期。
when 从句修饰 about 1,000 years ago，who 从句修饰 people。

sentences.sentence: It seems likely, in view of Obi's location, that this final phase of occupation also saw the Kelo shelters used by people involved in the historic trade in spices between the Maluku islands and the rest of the world.
sentences.translation: 鉴于奥比岛的位置，这一最后阶段的居住很可能也意味着凯洛岩棚曾被参与马鲁古群岛与世界其他地区之间历史香料贸易的人使用。

structure.text: that this final phase of occupation also saw the Kelo shelters used by people involved in the historic trade in spices between the Maluku islands and the rest of the world
the Kelo shelters used by people involved in the historic trade in spices
involved in the historic trade in spices
between the Maluku islands and the rest of the world

difficult_points: It seems likely 是形式主语结构，that 从句是真正判断内容。
in view of Obi's location 是插入的原因状语，表示这一推断基于地理位置。
saw the Kelo shelters used... 中 saw 表示“见证/经历”，used by people 是宾补。
